deploymentRequirements: Rick authorizes the production source update to the existing private Owner Portal
Authorized Apps Script and clasp session is available outside the repository
Create and retain a pre-write clasp pull backup and rollback archive
Push only to the existing bound Apps Script project ID
Update only the existing private deployment ID; do not create a second deployment
Confirm Script Properties and owner-only access remain correct
Run the non-destructive self-test in the private Owner Portal
Complete desktop and mobile manual acceptance and record evidence
prohibitedClaims: Do not call the new Owner Portal experience live before the existing private deployment is updated and verified
Do not claim customer portal activation
Do not claim any external provider action is enabled
nextExecutableStep: After authorized deployment access is available, create the rollback backup and update the existing private deployment using scripts/deploy-owner-portal-next-production.sh.
